title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Orient Electric - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Orient Electric - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Orient Electric are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Orient Electric:
Orient Electric is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Orient Electric!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
